name: you
description: You.com skills for search, contents, research, finance, and integration discovery with MCP, ARD, API-key, OAuth, and MPP/x402 payment guidance.

interface.shortDescription: You.com web search, research, finance, and discovery skills
interface.longDescription: Use You.com skills for current web search, URL content extraction, cited research, finance-specific answers, and integration discovery. The skills guide agents through free, API-key, OAuth, and MPP/x402 access paths without bundling a fixed MCP server configuration.
